footer.subtitle: Elevate your aesthetic with clinical precision and luxury care.

home.hero_subtitle: Experience where medical-grade safety meets high-end aesthetics. Discover a treatment tailored to the woman who demands excellence.
home.quality_desc: We don't just apply color; we build structure. We exclusively use world-class materials to ensure integrity and a high-gloss finish.
home.hygiene_desc: Your peace of mind is our foundation. Every instrument undergoes a rigorous hospital-grade autoclave sterilization before your visit.
home.atmosphere_desc: Escape the daily rush. Our studio offers a calm, pampering sanctuary tailored exclusively for your relaxation and beauty.

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Dedicated to the perfect detail
about.p1: I am Elena Epshtein, a specialist passionate about the medical and aesthetic care of hands and feet. The 'ELENA EPSHTEIN' brand was born from a desire to provide every client with a premium experience.
about.p2: I continuously train globally to bring you the safest, most innovative techniques. I approach every treatment as a unique art form—ensuring you leave feeling flawless and valued.

services.title: Signature Treatments
services.subtitle: Invest in Your Confidence
services.desc: Discover our curated range of luxury services. Every treatment is executed with profound attention to detail and uncompromising hygiene.

1.title: Precision Sculpted Gel
1.desc: Meticulous combined technique, flawless anatomic leveling, and deep under-cuticle color application for incredible longevity.

2.title: Essential Care Refresh
2.desc: A perfect refresh. Deep cuticle care and tailored shaping, finished with nourishing oils and a light hydration massage.

3.title: Restorative Medical Pedicure
3.desc: Ultimate foot rejuvenation. Expert dry skin removal and therapeutic restoration, finished with premium gel polish.

4.title: Structural Nail Repair
4.desc: Seamless, strong repair using advanced polygel techniques to perfectly match your natural nail shape.

5.title: Safe Gel Removal
5.desc: Gentle, non-destructive removal of external gel polish, preserving the integrity and health of your natural nail bed.

6.title: Bespoke Artistry
6.desc: Elevate your look with custom, hand-painted nail art. Pricing reflects the complexity of your vision.

booking.title: Book Your Experience
booking.subtitle: Provide your details, and we will personally confirm your appointment to ensure a flawless visit.
booking.form_success: Request received! We will reach out shortly to confirm your refined experience.
booking.form_error: An issue occurred. Please try again or reach out directly via WhatsApp.
booking.trust_banner: 🛡️ Clinical-Grade Sterilization • Premium Materials • Flawless Precision

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: Your journey to beauty begins here
contact.desc: Questions? Ready to book? We invite you to reach out through your preferred channel below.
contact.whatsapp_msg: Hi Elena, I would like to book a treatment!
